RuleSet.Name: src/Schema/jpa/SchemaJpaSchemaService.java
RuleSet.Descr: Java 25 Spring JPA Service for Schema

GenFile.Name: fileSchemaJpaSchemaServiceJava
GenFile.BasePackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$jpa/src/main/java
GenFile.SubPackageName: $reference ManufacturingSchema lower JavaPackage$.$reference ManufacturingSchema lower SchemaName$.jpa

RuleSet.GenRule: bootstrapTableSecurity(auth, now, "$TableName$", $switch HasHistory yes emitTrue default emitFalse$, $switch IsMutable yes emitTrue default emitFalse$, "$SecScope$", secSysGroupPublic, secSysGroupSysAdmin, secSysClusGroupSysAdmin, secSysTentGroupSysAdmin);
